mapper.update: update score_entry se inner join makeup_exam me on se.id = me.score_entry_id set se.makeup_score = #{makeupScore}, me.status = "已考" where me.id = #{id}
mapper.select: select m.id, m.score_entry_id, se.student_id, s.student_name, s.student_no, se.course_id, c.course_name, m.exam_date, m.start_time, m.end_time, m.status, m.create_time, m.update_time from makeup_exam m join score_entry se on m.score_entry_id = se.id join student s on se.student_id = s.id join course c on se.course_id = c.id where m.id = #{id}

select m.id, s.student_name, c.course_name, m.exam_date, m.start_time, m.end_time, m.status, m.create_time from makeup_exam m join score_entry se on m.score_entry_id = se.id join student s on se.student_id = s.id join course c on se.course_id = c.id
m.score_entry_id = #{scoreEntryId} and m.status = #{status}
